text:
Burvena (ブルベーナ, Burubēna) is the Private Guard of the Second Prince Camilla in charge of killing the Sixth Prince Tyson through a Nen curse. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 37, Chapter 389 

Appearance

Burvena has a round face, short, spiky fair hair, a high forehead and a small nose with a slightly bulbous tip. They wear the standard uniform of Camilla's private guards. 

Plot

Succession Contest arc

While Prince Camilla is confined to a room in the VVIP area, Burvena and most of her other bodyguards attend a meeting called by Sarahell about Shikaku's suicide. 

Abilities & Powers

Nen

Burvena is a Nen user and can cast the same curse as the other Have-Nots in Prince Camilla's employ. 

Manga Appearances

Trivia

The furigana name of the Have-Nots' curse is derived from Japanese mythology, specifically to Izanami's inability to leave the underworld due to having eaten of its food.
The kanji name of the curse, "Tsujitsuma Awase ni Umareta Bokura", is derived from a song by Amazarashi.
Viz localized the curse's name as "Dust in the Wind: Hell Fruit".
